#!/bin/sh
# Test for type-coercion-comparison bug
# Verifies that filtering by minimum rating returns the correct products.

set -e

cd /app

# Start the server in background
node server.js &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 2

cleanup() {
    kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null || true
}
trap cleanup EXIT

FAIL=0
